scripts.build: npm run docs:check && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/* dist/
scripts.test:full: node --test test/onboarding-account.test.js && node --test test/observability.test.js && node --test test/agent-arena-runtime.test.js && node --test test/play-rooms.test.js && node --test test/security-socket-ownership.test.js && node --test test/kpi-ops.test.js && node --test test/room-events-persistence.test.js && node --test test/starter-strategy.test.js && node --test test/agent-mafia.test.js && node --test test/clawofdeceit-decision-handler.test.js && node --test test/render-config.test.js
scripts.test:mvp: node --test test/render-config.test.js test/onboarding-account.test.js test/observability.test.js test/agent-arena-runtime.test.js test/starter-strategy.test.js test/agent-mafia.test.js test/play-rooms.test.js test/clawofdeceit-decision-handler.test.js
scripts.test:release: npm run build && npm run test:e2e -- test/e2e/navigation.spec.js
